extract: Iron Tail (Japanese: アイアンテール Iron Tail) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM23 from Generations II to IV as well as in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM19 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR31 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM087 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
